prompts.text: "Tertiary colours" — made by mixing a primary colour with a secondary colour next to it on the wheel. Red + orange = Vermillion.
Before mixing, ask: "I wonder what [colour A] and [colour B] will make?" — let them predict first.
After a correct result, say together: "[A] and [B] made [result]!" — say it slowly once more.
Ask: "Can you find that colour on the wheel? Is it closer to [A] or [B]?"
